name: Brno
author: ahkimn
description:
# Brno ### BRQ · v0.4.0 Part of the [EU Map Pack](https://ahkimn.github.io/subwaybuilder-eu-maps). ## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, each carrying a per-building foundation depth in in-game meters. Depths scale with building height and footprint width and are bounded to the **−10 m** to **−80 m** range: single-family homes and low-rise structures anchor at the floor, while supertall towers with deep bedrock piles (Taipei-101 class) reach the cap. Freestanding towers, masts, chimneys, and other slender non-occupiable structures are detected by shape and floored to the **−10 m** minimum. Foundation depths drive underground tunnel-clearance collision and are also emitted as a visual `foundations` pmtiles layer visible on the in-game map. Heights come from the ČÚZK airborne-LiDAR nDSM (DMP1G digital surface model minus DMR5G digital terrain model), with RUIAN floor counts × 3 m as the fallback for buildings post-dating the 2009–2013 laser scan. - **Neighborhood Labels** — Three layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Major city names at the metropolitan scale. - _Municipality labels_ — Names of all obce within the map boundary. - _Neighborhood labels_ — Basic settlement unit names (ZSJ — _základní sídelní jednotka_) from RUIAN cadastral data. ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Czech government census and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _obec_ (municipality) using population-weighted centroids derived from GHS-POP 100 m population grid data (JRC Global Human Settlement Layer R2023A). **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving CZSO 2021 Census (Sčítání lidu, domů a bytů 2021) totals for each obec. **Aggregation:** A global scaling factor reconciles the mismatch between boundary-captured employed residents (from Sčítání 2021) and workplace employees (from CZSO employment statistics). **Commute Assignment:** Commute flows are assigned directly from the official 2021 Census O/D commuter flow data at _ZSJ-díl_ (sub-municipal) granularity. **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, universities, hospitals, military installations, major sports facilities, libraries, marketplaces, and tourism attractions — are injected as an additive layer. Airport demand from Czech CAA (ÚCL) statistics; university demand from MŠMT per-faculty enrollment statistics; attraction demand primarily from tourdata.cz visitor counts across all 14 Czech _kraje_ (~1,800 attractions), supplemented by institutional annual reports for national cultural institutions that the tourism survey under-reports (national museum/gallery), and by curated operator estimates for major non-tourist demand generators such as large commercial-cultural marketplaces (e.g. the SAPA / "Little Hanoi" complex). Sports arena demand derived from per-club average attendance × home matches; library demand from per-library visitor counts in operator annual reports and NIPOS aggregates. Military-installation demand is a curated AČR garrison roster of active-duty personnel, net of the estimated on-base-resident fraction. **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Czech government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. ### Census & Demographics - **2021 Census** (Sčítání lidu, domů a bytů 2021 / SLDB 2021 — per-municipality and per-ZSJ-díl population and employment) — [ČSÚ / CZSO](https://www.czso.cz/) - **Commute O/D at ZSJ-díl level** (sub-municipal residence × workplace commuter flows) — [ČSÚ / CZSO](https://www.czso.cz/) - **Workplace Employment Statistics** (per-municipality occupied workplace count) — [ČSÚ Geodata](https://geodata.statistika.cz/) ### Geospatial Reference - **100 m Population Grid** (GHS-POP R2023A) — [JRC / EU Copernicus](https://ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu/) - **Administrative Boundaries** (RUIAN _obec_ + ZSJ-díl polygons) — [ČÚZK](https://www.cuzk.cz/) - **Building Polygons & Use Classification** (RUIAN _StavebniObjekt_ — footprints, floor counts and use-classification codes, refined by ZABAGED® building-type tags and land-use complexes so shopping centres read as retail, transport/logistics warehousing splits from manufacturing, and sports- and water-infrastructure shells are excluded from the worker surface; the sole building source for both modeled demand and the 3D building tiles) — [ČÚZK](https://www.cuzk.cz/) - **Building Heights** (ČÚZK airborne-LiDAR — DMP1G digital surface model minus DMR5G digital terrain model, i.e. nDSM; per-building measured height for the 3D building tiles, so tall single-storey industrial halls render at their true height, with RUIAN floor count × 3 m as the fallback for buildings post-dating the 2009–2013 laser scan) — [ČÚZK](https://www.cuzk.cz/) - **Land-Cover Polygons** (ZABAGED® Polohopis — parks, cemeteries, forests, grasslands, scrub, aerodromes; replaces OSM-derived landuse for accurate, agency-published, water-disjoint land cover) — [ČÚZK](https://www.cuzk.cz/) ### Special Demand Statistics - **Faculty Enrollment Data** (MŠMT per-faculty student headcount) — [MŠMT](https://dsia.msmt.cz/) - **Airport Passenger Statistics** — [ÚCL / Czech CAA](https://www.caa.cz/statistiky) - **Tourism Visitor Statistics** — [tourdata.cz / CzechTourism](https://tourdata.cz/) (primary attraction source), supplemented by **institutional annual reports** for national cultural institutions the survey under-reports ([Národní muzeum](https://www.nm.cz/), [Národní galerie Praha](https://www.ngprague.cz/)) and **curated operator estimates** for major non-tourist demand generators (large commercial-cultural marketplaces, e.g. SAPA Praha) - **Library Visitor Statistics** — [NIPOS Statistika kultury](https://www.statistikakultury.cz/) + per-library annual reports - **Theatre & Music-Ensemble Attendance** — [NIPOS Statistika kultury](https://www.statistikakultury.cz/) (Divadla + Hudební soubory) - **Spa Overnight-Stay Statistics** (lázně represented as hot-spring attractions, town/cluster grain) — ČSÚ spa-accommodation overnight stays (Špaček et al. 2018) - **Football League Attendance** (Chance Liga + Chance národní liga) — [chanceliga.cz](https://www.chanceliga.cz/statistiky-rekordy) - **Ice Hockey League Attendance** (Tipsport Extraliga + Chance Liga) — [hokej.cz](https://www.hokej.cz/) - **Hospital Bed Statistics** (ÚZIS Lůžkový fond per-facility bed counts + occupancy; NRPZS provider register for facility addresses) — [ÚZIS ČR](https://www.uzis.cz/) - **Military Installations** (AČR garrison roster — active-duty personnel curated from official unit references and public sources) ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-eu-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
